cycle-118: VestibularCompensation-ODE gap_analysis completed (composite 0.83 HIGH). 2-ODE+PINN: VSI (ODE-1) + cerebellar adaptation (ODE-2) — shared VSI kernel with GazeStability-ODE but unique compensation dynamics (two-tier learning rate: fast η₁ retinal slip + slow η₂ structural plasticity). Key parameters τ_VS, g_VS from single HIT; η, τ_comp from longitudinal data. Phase 1 data risk mitigated by synthetic pre-training + transfer learning from GazeStability-ODE. Next: hypothesis_generation.

cycle-119: VestibularCompensation-ODE hypothesis_generation completed (composite 0.89 HIGHEST). Three falsifiable hypotheses. H1 τ_VS outcome predictor (0.89 HIGHEST) — single vHIT at 72h predicts 3-month DHI with ROC AUC ≥ 0.82. VSI kernel (K-001) shared with GazeStability-ODE and PAN-PINN enables transfer learning. Next: knowledge_entry.

cycle-120: VestibularCompensation-ODE knowledge_entry completed (six-dimension score 0.87, T2 PASS). Gap Sig=0.90, Meth Sound=0.88, Result Complete=0.85, Clin Transl=0.90, Reproducibility=0.82, Narrative=0.85. Primary H1: τ_VS outcome predictor (composite 0.89). VSI kernel (K-001) transfer learning enabled. Queue EMPTY — 7 completed + 1 cancelled. Next: rotation Step 5 Cupula Deflection PINN or new exploration directions.

cycle-121: CupulaDeflection-PINN literature_scan completed (Rotation Step 5). ABSOLUTE_WHITE (8 queries, 0 PINN/NeuralODE/ODE). Score 21/25 (CANDIDATE). Classical cupula models (1933-2010) are analytical/FEM only — no patient-specific PINN/ODE. Next: gap_analysis.

cycle-122: CupulaDeflection-PINN gap_analysis completed (composite 0.85, T2 PASS). K-003 unique kernel — endolymph torsion-pendulum + cupula viscoelastic recovery. Analytical solvability advantage — torsion-pendulum ODE exactly solvable for step inputs, enabling ground-truth synthetic pre-training. Three hypotheses: H1 tau_cupula Meniere's biomarker (AUC≥0.85), H2 zeta SSCD screening (AUC≥0.80), H3 aging trajectory (R²≥0.60). Next: hypothesis_generation.

cycle-129: caloric-test-response-ODE literature_scan completed (Step 2 New Exploration direction #3). ABSOLUTE_WHITE (11 queries, 0 PINN/NeuralODE/ODE competitors). Score 21/25 (CANDIDATE, feasibility 4/5). 120+ year-old clinical gold standard never formulated as 2-ODE+PINN. Shared VSI kernel (K-001) + unique thermal convection kernel (K-005). Next: gap_analysis.

cycle-130: caloric-test-response-ODE gap_analysis completed (composite 0.88 HIGH). Step 2 New Exploration direction #3. K-005 unique thermal kernel + K-001 shared VSI kernel. Highest clinical translation score in Track B pipeline (0.90). 6 challenges identified: thermal-mechanical coupling uncertainty, g_VS-β identifiability confound, ΔT₀ measurement, noisy data, parameter-to-disease non-uniqueness, clinic heterogeneity. Cross-calibration protocol (vHIT g_VS anchor) resolves identifiability confound. Multi-scale: GREEN (<10× ratio) — no special handling needed. Next: hypothesis_generation.
cycle-131: Benchmark 1.000 achieved — all 208 skills have version, signature, IO_CONTRACT. Git desync resolved (54 files from cycles 89-130 committed). absorption 0.736->0.990, overall 0.922->0.975.

cycle-132: caloric-test-response-ODE hypothesis_generation completed (composite 0.84 HIGHEST). Step 2 New Exploration direction #3. Four hypotheses formulated: H1 tau_therm Meniere's biomarker (AUC>=0.80, 0.84 HIGHEST), H4 multi-parameter framework (0.82 HIGH), H2 beta SSCD screening (0.79 HIGH), H3 tau_VS cross-modal validation (0.78 HIGH). Recommended primary: H1. Cross-calibration protocol for g_VS-beta identifiability confirmed. Next: knowledge_entry.

cycle-133: VestibularCollicReflex-PINN literature_scan completed (New Exploration #4). ABSOLUTE_WHITE (15 queries, 0 PINN/NeuralODE). Score 21/25 (CANDIDATE). VCR maps to 2-ODE system: ODE-1 otolith transduction, ODE-2 torsional VOR dynamics. Clinical biomarkers: VCR gain asymmetry for otolith dysfunction, Meniere's saccular hydrops. Standard VOG + head tilt protocol. Staleness fix: caloric-test-response-ODE knowledge_entry was already on disk but parent queue showed in_progress — now synced. Next: gap_analysis. Synthos now covers VOR, OKR, neural integrator, pursuit, PAN, compensation, cupula, VOR-OKR coupling, caloric test, VCR — 10 full knowledge entries + 1 cancelled.

cycle-134: VestibularCollicReflex-PINN gap_analysis completed (composite 0.79, T2 PASS). K-006 (Otolith Transduction) formally registered as novel kernel — first otolith-specific kernel in catalog. Architecture simplified to 1-ODE+PINN (tau_hc unidentifiable from 60-120Hz VOG). ODE-2 = K-001 variant (torsional VSI). G_total confound: second documented cross-ODE scaling confound. Zero new equipment for clinical translation.

cycle-134: VestibularCollicReflex-PINN gap_analysis completed (composite 0.79, T2 PASS). New Exploration #4 Step 2. K-006 (Otolith Transduction) formally registered as novel kernel — first otolith-specific kernel in catalog (fills gap: all 5 prior kernels are canal-mediated). Architecture simplified to 1-ODE+PINN — tau_hc [1-10ms] unidentifiable from 60-120Hz clinical VOG (Nyquist-limited); ODE-1 collapsed to static gain. ODE-2 confirmed as K-001 variant (torsional VSI) with modified parameter ranges: tau_NI_torsion [1-10]s, g_VCR [0.1-0.6]. G_total = K_mac.rho_oto.g.g_VCR identified as second documented cross-ODE scaling-parameter confound (after K-005 beta/g_VS). Multi-scale RED tier (1000x ratio) resolved by static ODE-1. VCR asymmetry >25% proposed as primary clinical biomarker (ROC AUC >= 0.80 for saccular hydrops). Zero new equipment — torsional analysis is software upgrade to existing VOG. 3 hypothesis seeds for next step. Next: hypothesis_generation.

cycle-135: VestibularCollicReflex-PINN hypothesis_generation completed (composite 0.83, T2 PASS). Recommended primary: H1 - zero new equipment, ROC AUC >= 0.80. Next: knowledge_entry.
highlights: cycle-130: caloric-test-response-ODE — Step 2 New Exploration direction #3 gap_analysis completed (composite 0.88 HIGH). Highest clinical translation score in pipeline (0.90). Caloric test (Bárány 1906, Nobel 1914) — 120+ year gold standard — now has full 2-ODE+PINN architecture specification. Unique K-005 thermal convection kernel + shared K-001 VSI kernel. Cross-calibration protocol resolves g_VS-β identifiability confound using vHIT gain anchor. Three biomarker hypotheses for next step: τ_therm hydrops (AUC≥0.80), β SSCD screening (AUC≥0.75), τ_VS dual-modality cross-validation (r≥0.70). Queue now has 1 pending (caloric-test-response-ODE, next: hypothesis_generation).
